Police get a call from a petrol station reporting a driver has refused to pay for fuel, got aggressive with staff and then spun off. PC Billy Stead and Nathan Saltmer race to intercept the car. On the A63 in Hull, PC Luke Thundercliffe has his eyes on a white van driver with his foot down. When he pulls it over, the driver says it's a work van and he's insured to drive it under work policy. The only problem is the driver isn't showing on the policy and to make matters worse he doesn't even have a full licence. And PC Martin Leak is on patrol in Hull when he watches a car drive straight through a pedestrian crossing, almost hitting someone trying to cross. Narrated by Nicky Campbell.
